# crates/attractor-web/style/

Web UI styling for Attractor — defines terminal and document viewer layout with a dark Catppuccin Mocha-inspired theme.

## Contents

[main.scss](./main.scss) — Single-file stylesheet defining the complete Attractor web UI appearance. Implements flex/grid layout for workspace, terminal wrapper, document viewer with tabs, project sidebar, folder picker modal, execution panel with node states, and full markdown rendering. Includes keyframes for `spin` and `pulse`, responsive breakpoint at 1800px for 3-column documents mode.

## Behavioral Contracts

### Color Palette

```scss
$primary: #89b4fa
$primary-hover: #74a8f7
$success: #a6e3a1
$error: #f38ba8
$warning: #f9e2af
$surface0: #313244
$surface1: #45475a
$surface2: #585b70
$text: #cdd6f4
$subtext: #a6adc8
$overlay: #6c7086
$base: #1e1e2e
$mantle: #181825
$crust: #11111b
$radius: 8px
$radius-sm: 4px
```

### Breakpoints

`@media (min-width: 1800px)` activates `.documents-mode` class enabling 3-column layout.
